visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind two soda cans.
A green and silver Sprite can, located directly in front of the water bottle.
A red and white Coca-Cola can, located to the left of the green can and also in front of the water bottle.
A red package of tea bags, positioned to the right of the other items.

action_plan.explanation: Removing the green soda can which is directly blocking the front of the water bottle.
Removing the red soda can to fully clear the access path to the water bottle.
Picking the water bottle now that it is fully accessible.
